All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
FinalController
Controller for the final screen of the game.
GameController
Controller for the main game screen.
GameLogic
Manages the core game state and logic for "El Sol Eclipsado."
Launcher
Entry point class for the application.
Main
Main application class that extends JavaFX Application.
SecretWord
Represents the secret word for the "Sol Eclipsado" game.
StageMain
Manages the primary stage (window) of the application.
WelcomeController
Controller for the welcome screen (initial view).
